name: front_spring_rate_n_per_m
label: front spring rate
description: Front shock spring table terminal rate. Spring free length is updated from baseline FourPost motion ratio to preserve the configured static spring length.

name: rear_spring_rate_n_per_m
label: rear spring rate
description: Rear shock spring table terminal rate. Spring free length is updated from baseline FourPost motion ratio to preserve the configured static spring length.

name: front_toe_deg
label: front static toe
description: Front static toe angle in the BobLib partial wheel record.

name: rear_toe_deg
label: rear static toe
description: Rear static toe angle in the BobLib partial wheel record.

name: front_camber_deg
label: front static camber
description: Front static inclination angle in the BobLib partial wheel record.

name: rear_camber_deg
label: rear static camber
description: Rear static inclination angle in the BobLib partial wheel record.

name: sprung_mass_kg
label: sprung mass
description: Sprung mass before driver mass is combined.

name: torsional_stiffness_n_m_per_rad
label: body torsional stiffness
description: Body torsional stiffness used by the compliant chassis.

name: aero_downforce_scale
label: aero downforce scale
description: Scale applied to downforce and pitch-moment aero tables.

name: aero_drag_scale
label: aero drag scale
description: Scale applied to the drag aero table.

name: lateral_tire_mu_scale
label: lateral tire friction scale
description: Scale applied to front and rear MF52 lateral friction multipliers.

name: front_rack_travel_per_rev_m
label: front rack travel per rev
description: Front steering rack travel per handwheel revolution.
